title: verbenaceae
intro: The Verbenaceae rank, also known as the Verbena family, is a family of flowering plants that consists of approximately 150-200 species. These species are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world, with some species also native to temperate regions. The Verbenaceae family includes a diverse range of plants, such as the verbena, lantana, and alstroemeria, which are known for their fragrant flowers and various shapes. This family is part of the order Lamiales and is characterized by its distinctive floral structure and unique growth habits.
